name: Cradle of Nightmares
short_description: You play as Faust, an agent of the secret organization Nostra Edemas. Using technology in time, you must bring to justice the brutal killers of the past - both known and real, atrocities remained in the shadows of history.
detailed_description:
Russia, alternative 2000s.

In one of the old abandoned manors hidden deep within Russia, a secret order known as Nostra Edemas operates in the shadows. Thanks to a unique technology called the Chronotron—a legendary fusion of magic and science—their agents can travel through time to arrest and deliver justice to deviants: the most dangerous murderers of the past, both infamous and forgotten by history.

Cradle of Nightmares is the first episode in a gripping franchise with an original setting and a haunting atmosphere.

You will play as Vasiliy Beiner, a chronagent of the secret organization Nostra Edemas, known by his codename Faust 21. Your mission is to travel back in time to track, neutralize, and put on trial deviants whose crimes must be uncovered and avenged.

You will find yourself in the lair of a maniac, where you must explore dark environments, uncover key items, and solve intricate puzzles.

Game Features:

• Atmosphere and Deep Narrative
The story is inspired by the writings of renowned psychiatrist Vasiliy Beinarovich, whose persona is adapted in the game as the main character—Faust 21.

• Real Figures and Events
In Cradle of Nightmares, you will encounter historical figures and serial killers whose crimes once struck fear into the hearts of many. In future episodes of the franchise, you will also meet legendary detectives who hunted these murderers.

• Easter Eggs for Sharp-Eyed Players
The game includes references to pop culture that only the most observant players will be able to find.

• Unique Mechanic — “Carousel of Madness”
At certain points, the maniac enters a state of madness. The environment is plunged into darkness, and he begins to move unpredictably around the house, hunting for you. Can you survive the nightmare?

⚠️ Warning:
This game contains scenes of violence and brutality. Intended for players aged 18 and older.
